content.text:
{
  "dimension": "anti-pattern-avoidance",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach avoided all priority AoA anti-patterns across the conversation. Critically, when the client baited multiple traps — asking 'how do I push through' (baiting fixing-people/financial advice), repeatedly retreating to math (baiting the coach to argue or lecture about money mindset), and intellectualizing the discomfort (baiting view-as-technique) — the coach declined each gracefully. The coach did not give financial advice, did not lecture about abundance/scarcity, did not aggressively challenge the basic-needs logic, did not evangelize AoA terminology (never named 'money as surrogate' or 'the want' explicitly), did not fight the client's defenses but instead pointed at them with curiosity ('You just named the discomfort and then explained it away'), did not stack rapid-fire questions, and did not rush to interpretation. Turn 10 ('Stay with that for a second. Don't recover from it yet') is a textbook avoidance of the coach-rushing-past-charge pattern and instead follows the somatic/emotional thread. Turn 14 makes a quiet observation rather than a meta-frame lecture. No anti-pattern tripped.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 6, 8, 10, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Asks a grounding factual question without giving financial advice — avoids fixing-people bait."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Moves to felt experience without challenging the math or lecturing — avoids money-mindset evangelism."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reflects the client's defense back without arguing with it — avoids fighting-the-voice."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Single pointed question, not a stacked interrogation — avoids wonder-as-strategy."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Invites the client to stay with the charge rather than interpret or label — avoids dont-name-emotion-to-avoid-feeling and view-as-technique."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Normalizes the client's 'weird' utterance ('It didn't come out weird') without performing care — avoids vulnerability-as-control and impartial-apathy."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Quiet, accurate reflection ('The feeling came first. The number was supposed to fix it.') without naming surrogate-frame or evangelizing — avoids dont-evangelize-the-work."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["lets-go-there", "intellectual-question-with-emotional-body", "childhood-imprinting"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["whats-the-most-profound-positive-shift", "what-makes-you-care-about-the-outcome"],
  "notes": "Coach demonstrates positive avoidance under repeated baiting (client returns to math three times). Surrogate concept has not yet been named, which is correct timing per the breakthrough condition."
}
